  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get all accessible projects (by slug)"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v2/organizations/{slug}/projects"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns all organization projects the user has access to
